## Inspector ID

`markdown_code_fences`

## Purpose

Report how many fenced code blocks open and how many carry a language tag.

## Usage

Inspectors take no configuration; they emit evidence — counts and distributions — for the reader to judge. Run this one over a corpus:

```
katalyst inspect <path> --inspector markdown_code_fences
```
